# Known Delta-on-Gluten unit test failures.
#
# This is the baseline of delta-io/delta `spark` ScalaTest tests that are
# currently EXPECTED to fail when run against the Gluten Velox bundle. The
# Delta Spark UT (Gluten) workflow compares each run against this list:
#
#   * a failing test that is NOT listed here  -> REGRESSION (fails CI),
#   * a failing test that IS listed here       -> expected (ignored),
#   * a listed test that now PASSES            -> remove it from this file.
#
# Format (one test per line):
#
#   <fully.qualified.SuiteName>#<test display name>
#
# The suite is a JVM class name, so the FIRST '#' separates the suite from the
# (possibly '#'-containing) test name. Lines starting with '#' are comments.
#
# This file is empty until the baseline is bootstrapped. While it is empty the
# workflow runs in SEED mode (it never fails, it only records failures). To
# populate it, run the "Delta Spark UT (Gluten)" workflow with
# `update_baseline=true`, download the `delta-spark-ut-known-failures` artifact,
# and commit its contents over this file. After that, every run enforces the
# baseline.
#
# See README.md in this directory for the full workflow.
#
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# BEGIN known failures (sorted, one per line)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
